data.title: Three wins at the European Design Awards
data.content:
We are honoured to have received three awards at this year's European Design Awards in Barcelona. VOID took Gold in the Spatial Design category, METAMORPHOSIS received Silver for Brand Identity, and ECHO CHAMBER was recognised with a Bronze in Digital Experience.

A huge thanks to every collaborator, fabricator, and late-night thinker who made these projects real. These awards belong to the entire extended studio.
data.excerpt: VOID, METAMORPHOSIS, and ECHO CHAMBER recognised at the 2024 European Design Awards in Barcelona.
